case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. CHING YEE CHOW et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, CHING YEE DOES 1 THROUGH 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-08-2009

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1033; WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES; CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
DECLARATION AND ORDER RE: COPY IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA EVIDENCE CODE 1550 & 1551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, CHING YEE $15,635.75 PRINCIPAL, $2,912.96 INTEREST, $378.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,926.71, SEE SCANNED DOC
